MemberSignature.Value: public virtual Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentResource> CreateOrUpdate (Azure.WaitUntil waitUntil, string policyAssignmentName, Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentData data, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentResource> CreateOrUpdate(valuetype Azure.WaitUntil waitUntil, string policyAssignmentName, class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentData data, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Overridable Function CreateOrUpdate (waitUntil As WaitUntil, policyAssignmentName As String, data As PolicyAssignmentData, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As ArmOperation(Of PolicyAssignmentResource)

abstract member CreateOrUpdate : Azure.WaitUntil * string * Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentData * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentResource> override this.CreateOrUpdate : Azure.WaitUntil * string * Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentData * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentResource>

Docs.param: if the method should wait to return until the long-running operation has completed on the service; if it should return after starting the operation. For more information on long-running operations, please see Azure.Core Long-Running Operation samples.
The name of the policy assignment to get.
Parameters for the policy assignment.
The cancellation token to use.
Docs.summary:
This operation creates or updates a policy assignment with the given scope and name. Policy assignments apply to all resources contained within their scope. For example, when you assign a policy at resource group scope, that policy applies to all resources in the group.
Request Path. /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/{policyAssignmentName}.
Operation Id. PolicyAssignments_Create.
Default Api Version. 2025-12-01-preview.
Docs.exception: is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.

Docs.summary:
This operation retrieves a single policy assignment, given its name and the scope it was created at.
Request Path. /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/{policyAssignmentName}.
Operation Id. PolicyAssignments_Get.
Default Api Version. 2025-12-01-preview.
